# Security Policy

See the [root SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the full policy,
scope (including dataset-integrity and adapter-script coverage),
response-time commitments, supply-chain-integrity posture, and
regulatory-reporting obligations under EU Regulation 2024/2847
(Cyber Resilience Act).

**Report vulnerabilities privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/datadrivenconstruction/OpenConstructionEstimate-DDC-CWICR/security/advisories/new)
or by email to `info@datadrivenconstruction.io`.**
